title: Ambuja Cements is Hiring: Quality Control Engineer (Mid-Level)

jsonLd.title: Ambuja Cements is Hiring: Quality Control Engineer (Mid-Level)
jsonLd.description:
We at Ambuja Cements are looking for an experienced Quality Control Engineer based out of Nashik. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Ambuja Cements:
Ambuja Cements is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Monitor equipment performance and coordinate preventive maintenance
• Coordinate with logistics for dispatching finished goods
• Manage raw material procurement and inventory levels
• Prepare production cost analysis and efficiency reports
• Implement lean manufacturing and continuous improvement initiatives
• Conduct root cause analysis for quality rejections and defects
• Coordinate with design and engineering teams on product improvements

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in SAP MM/PP
• Proficiency in Root Cause Analysis
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in Statistical Process Control
• Proficiency in 5S
• Proficiency in SolidWorks
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in Six Sigma

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Professional development and training programs
• Annual performance appraisal
• Referral bonus program
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Nashik, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Ambuja Cements!
